### read_json_config

>  read_json_config (path:pathlib.Path)

*Read a JSON configuration file.*

Returns empty dict if file doesn’t exist or is invalid.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>

<td>Path</td>
<td>Path to JSON file.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>dict</strong></td>
<td><strong>Parsed JSON or empty dict on error.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## TOML Configuration

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/io.py#L60"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### read_toml_config

>  read_toml_config (path:pathlib.Path)

*Read a TOML configuration file.*

Returns empty dict if file doesn’t exist or is invalid. Uses tomllib
(Python 3.11+) or tomli as fallback.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>path</td>
<td>Path</td>
<td>Path to TOML file.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>dict</strong></td>
<td><strong>Parsed TOML or empty dict on error.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/io.py#L91"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### write_toml_config

>  write_toml_config (path:pathlib.Path, config:dict)

*Write a TOML configuration file.*

Creates parent directories if needed. Uses tomli_w if available,
otherwise manual formatting.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>path</td>
<td>Path</td>
<td>Path to TOML file.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config</td>
<td>dict</td>
<td>Configuration to write.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>None</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
